prestazioni: Engine swap to Hyundai Lambda II RS 3.8L GDI (G6DJ) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Brian Crower Stage 3 camshaft kit (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power retention. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by Agency Power for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors (1,050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and a Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU for precise lambda control. Use a custom 3.5-inch intercooler piping kit by Vibrant Performance with a PWR 4-core intercooler (1,200hp capacity) to maintain IATs under 40°C at 22psi boost.

Drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.11 final drive ratio) with a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (puck-style) and a Peloquin differential cover. Replace the stock half-shafts with Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch chromoly axles and a custom aluminum driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop to handle 600+ lb-ft of torque.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Type 3) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear) and a Rocket Bunny rear diffuser (Type 2) for aggressive stance. Use Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 (front) and 19x12 +35 (rear) wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear).

Full custom aero package: Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional vents for intercooler airflow) and a custom 3D-printed front splitter by 996 Motorsports (2.5-inch overhang, 30lbs downforce at 100mph). Rear wing is a custom 1/4-scale replica of the Hyundai N Vision 74’s active rear wing, fabricated by APR Performance (adjustable angle, 40lbs downforce at 120mph).

Interior overhaul: Recaro SPG XL seats (HYUNDAI-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly). Replace the stock steering wheel with a NRG Innovations R2 350mm suede wheel and a quick-release hub. Full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Katzkin, with custom LED ambient lighting by Diode Dynamics (RGB, 16.8 million colors).
